subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! The Lord of the hidden and the manifest maketh mention of thee before the face of the world and giveth thee glad-tidings of this Revelation whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن یذکرک مولی السر و العلن امام وجه العالم و یبشرک بهذا الظهور الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
